'''zarada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uvea|uvea]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-r-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uvea|uvea]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zarada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zærædæth|zærædæth]] || [[word:zærædæj|zærædæj]] || [[word:zærædæsh|zærædæsh]] || [[word:zærædæ|zærædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zararadath|zararadath]] || [[word:zararadaj|zararadaj]] || [[word:zararadash|zararadash]] || [[word:zararada|zararada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zaradath|zaradath]] || [[word:zaradaj|zaradaj]] || [[word:zaradash|zaradash]] || [[word:zarada|zarada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zarafdath|zarafdath]] || [[word:zarafdaj|zarafdaj]] || [[word:zarafdash|zarafdash]] || [[word:zarafdaf|zarafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zaradatha|zaradatha]] || [[word:zaradaja|zaradaja]] || [[word:zaradasha|zaradasha]] || [[word:zaradaka|zaradaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zaradath|zaradath]] || [[word:zaradaj|zaradaj]] || [[word:zaradash|zaradash]] || [[word:zarada|zarada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zaradathal|zaradathal]] || [[word:zaradajal|zaradajal]] || [[word:zaradashal|zaradashal]] || [[word:zaradakal|zaradakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zaradathatha|zaradathatha]] || [[word:zaradajaja|zaradajaja]] || [[word:zaradashasha|zaradashasha]] || [[word:zaradaka|zaradaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zaradathan|zaradathan]] || [[word:zaradajan|zaradajan]] || [[word:zaradashan|zaradashan]] || [[word:zaradakan|zaradakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zaradathaoro|zaradathaoro]] || [[word:zaradajaoro|zaradajaoro]] || [[word:zaradashaoro|zaradashaoro]] || [[word:zaradakaoro|zaradakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
